heading: Pyth-1 issue register and prior-art alignment built
text:
type: observation
tags: [qa, pyth1, corpus-ingestion, prior-art, issue-register]
body: Built two machine-tract artifacts for the Pyth-1 reinterpretation pass. `pyth1_issue_register.json` now isolates the 5 flagged items from batch 001 with severity and resolution lanes: 1 true contradiction requiring investigation at pyth1_p016_l1109, 3 source-layer ambiguities at pyth1_p034_l2226 / pyth1_p059_l4435 / pyth1_p066_l5053, and 1 OCR corruption at pyth1_p080_l6103. `pyth1_prior_art_alignment.json` maps all 10 accepted Pyth-1 reinterpretations onto explicit theory lanes and the repo prior-art stack: Pythagorean triples, rational trigonometry, chromogeometry, Ptolemy/UHG, and Egyptian fractions/HAT. Current stability split is 5 stable and 5 flagged. This promotes the subproject from intake inventory to controlled reinterpretation with issue isolation and project-anchor provenance for downstream table/program reproduction.
